## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss strategic issues around AirOps relationship, migration plans, and scaling the business.](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [AirOps pricing/relationship is unsustainable; need to migrate off platform within 2-3 months](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Immediate focus on reducing AirOps usage/costs while building alternative infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Prioritize defensibility (brand, distribution, network effects) over just competitive advantages](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=648.0)
  - [Consider raising capital on favorable terms to accelerate growth and build defensibility](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Topics

### AirOps Relationship & Migration

  - [Current usage \~3M tasks/month ($18k at list price)](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1510.0)
  - [AirOps proposing 50% discount + $5-10k platform fee; deemed unacceptable](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1554.0)
  - [Plan to migrate components off AirOps over 2-3 months:](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [Swap AirOps nodes for API calls](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1692.0)
      - [Use own API keys to reduce costs](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
      - [Target 500k-1M tasks/month by end of December](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1395.0)
  - [Risks: AirOps has access to workflows/data; need to abstract/protect IP](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Short-term: Buy time in negotiations, reduce usage, prepare migration plan](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1641.0)
  - [Long-term: Build robust alternative on Retool, n8n, temporal, etc.](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)

### Workflow Optimization

  - [Keyword research consuming excessive resources](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1338.0)
  - [Shift to more human-guided process:](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1648.0)
      - [Run initial SEMrush keyword gap analysis](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1476.0)
      - [Have VA filter 3000 URLs down to 500-1000 most relevant](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1501.0)
      - [Only run full workflow on top \~300 keywords (1 year of content)](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1505.0)
  - [Clients often deviate from long-term content plans; build in flexibility](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1432.0)

### Team & Hiring

  - [4 new managing editors started; high-caliber talent](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Potential hire: Danny (ex-G2, Metadata.io) for sales/ops role](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=406.0)
  - [Exploring hiring outbound specialists to handle 8-10 accounts each](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=884.0)
  - [Need to define "managing editor equivalent" for other workstreams](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=810.0)

### Product & Infrastructure

  - [Website development deprioritized to focus on AirOps migration](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)
  - [Exploring Data Grid as potential AirOps alternative](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=939.0)
  - [Need to build human review capabilities into new infrastructure](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1649.0)
  - [Retool identified as promising platform for backend/internal tools](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=902.0)

### Business Strategy

  - [Pipeline indicates potential for $300k ARR if current deals close](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1245.0)
  - [Losing some deals to competitors (e.g. AirOps) for first time](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Need to focus on building defensibility beyond just speed/execution](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1725.0)
  - [Consider raising capital to accelerate growth and defensibility](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=749.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Daniel: Develop timeline for full AirOps account shutdown](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1039.0)
  - [Jimmy: Estimate time required to migrate each workflow off AirOps](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Point: Draft response to AirOps, negotiate for time/better terms](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1879.0)
  - [Team: Implement API key swaps in AirOps to reduce short-term costs](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1731.0)
  - [Jimmy: Inform team to stop running full 3000 URL analyses for new clients](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1833.0)
  - [Point: Explore raising capital on favorable terms to accelerate growth](https://fathom.video/share/asTiq3ELbgpLAMJzNGdRoxeMEt2txYRT?tab=summary&timestamp=1745.0)
